TextView.android:text: Please drive the vehicle on both Petrol and LPG modes to capture STFT/LTFT matrix data.
Connect to vehicle, then use the buttons above.
Select interface language / เลือกภาษา
Choose dark, light, or system default
IP of the OBD2 WiFi adapter
Pair the ELM327/OBD2 adapter in Android Bluetooth settings first.
Scan all protocols (Ford: HS-CAN + MS-CAN, Toyota, Honda, Isuzu, etc)
MAF Air Flow + Vehicle Speed (km/L, L/100km)
Banks iDash style — AAD/MAD/BAD + 10 advanced formulas (live weather API)
Directory for saving CSV and JSONL log files
